question: Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I recently rented an old attic with a skylight and want to transform it into a minimalist wabi-sabi style ceramics studio. Please provide a complete soft furnishing and spatial planning proposal with both images and text: first, give me an overall spatial atmosphere rendering; then, separately provide close-up reference images for the wall material and the worktable surface material; finally, draw a simple functional zoning floor plan sketch. The text portion should explain why these materials were chosen and the logic behind the circulation flow design.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm creating a surrealist composite poster with a dried-up salt lake as the background. I need you to help me generate several cutout-ready assets (on white or pure black backgrounds), along with notes on the compositing approach. First, give me a 'melting metal pocket watch', then a 'giant throne woven from dead tree branches', and finally provide me with a layout composition draft showing how these elements are arranged on the salt lake background. Below each image, clearly indicate the lighting and shadow direction I should pay attention to during post-production color grading.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My boss assigned me to handle the visual planning for the e-commerce product detail page of a premium anti-aging cream featuring 'deep sea giant kelp extract' as its hero ingredient. I need you to help me output image-text drafts for 3 core visual sections in webpage scroll order: 1. Hero banner (emphasizing the mystique of the deep sea and the premium luxury feel of the product); 2. Texture showcase section (requires a close-up shot of the cream with a thread-pulling stringy texture); 3. Core ingredient educational section (botanical illustration-style imagery featuring giant kelp). Each section should include corresponding layout suggestions and copywriting.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm preparing to lead a team on a hardcore off-road crossing expedition through the Dahai Dao (Great Sea Road) uninhabited region in Xinjiang. Help me create a visual route book for the team members. I don't want ordinary scenic photos. I need: 1. A route schematic map with contour lines and key coordinate points; 2. Reference images of typical road conditions in Yardang landforms under harsh noon sunlight (to highlight driving difficulty); 3. An overhead view of vehicle parking in a wind-blocking formation at the campsite. The text portion should provide specific driving and camping guidance integrated with the images.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm preparing a creative advertisement for noise-canceling headphones with the theme 'One-Click Switch to a Parallel Universe'. Help me create a 4-shot storyboard. The visuals should be in black-and-white line art style, with only the headphones retaining bright yellow. Shot 1: A noisy, crowded morning rush-hour subway; Shot 2: Close-up of the protagonist's hand pressing the headphone button; Shot 3: Visual effects of the surrounding environment beginning to peel away like shattered fragments; Shot 4: The protagonist instantly transported to the top of a vast, empty snow-capped mountain peak. Include cinematographic annotations (shot size, camera movement) and sound effect descriptions below each storyboard panel.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: We are organizing a small educational exhibition on 'The History of Ancient Chinese Timekeeping Devices.' The venue is an empty rectangular room. Please provide a complete visual and visitor circulation design plan for the exhibition: first, a top-down visitor circulation map; then two concept designs for key exhibition displays (one for an interactive projection display stand featuring a sundial, and one for a display cabinet housing a miniature model of the Water-Powered Astronomical Clock Tower). The accompanying text should explain the lighting arrangement and how the interactive installations work.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I am conceptualizing my next season's independent designer clothing collection, inspired by 'fungal spores under a microscope.' Do not show me photos of finished garments! I need you to first generate 3 microscope-perspective macro images of different fungal spores (colors should be vibrant with an alien, otherworldly aesthetic), and then based on these 3 images, generate corresponding fabric texture design images for each (such as jacquard, embroidery, or pleating techniques). The text portion should provide detailed explanations of the transformation logic from spore morphology to fabric craftsmanship.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I am planning to develop a smart flower-growing APP for elderly users. Help me create a preliminary visual proposal. First, design an APP mascot (an anthropomorphic little flowerpot wearing reading glasses, in 3D clay style); then, provide me with two high-fidelity UI mockups of core interfaces: one being a homepage with 'large fonts and high contrast', and the other being a pop-up interface for watering reminders. For the text portion, please explain your typography and color scheme choices from an age-friendly design perspective.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I've taken on a project to create brand visuals for a boutique guesthouse located at the edge of the desert. The guesthouse is called 'Trace of Wind'. I need you to provide: 1. A minimalist-style logo design (incorporating windblown sand and architectural geometric lines); 2. A style mockup for staff uniforms (linen material, earth tone color palette); 3. A welcome gift box packaging design to be placed in guest rooms. Each design must be accompanied by a design concept statement for client presentation.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: There is an abandoned rooftop terrace in our community, and I want to propose to the residents' committee to transform it into a 'therapeutic community farm.' Help me create visually rich proposal PPT materials. First image: an overall bird's-eye view rendering of the renovated rooftop (must include a planting zone, composting zone, and rest area); Second image: a structural diagram of accessible raised planting beds (convenient for elderly wheelchair users); Third image: a nighttime lighting effect rendering with solar-powered ambient lights. The text should describe the community interaction value of each zone.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I need to design posters for an avant-garde play titled 'Macbeth: The Wolf of Wall Street.' The requirement is extremely strong visual impact, with no specific human faces shown. Please provide me with 3 poster drafts featuring different layouts and visual focal points (including placeholders for Chinese and English typography). Concept A should emphasize 'shattered glass and bloodstains'; Concept B should utilize 'stock market candlestick charts morphing into a crown'; Concept C should use 'an abyss-like elevator shaft.' Each concept should include color psychology analysis and font selection recommendations.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Next week I'm going to shoot a set of high-end jewelry still life photographs (an emerald necklace) in my studio. I want to use a 'water ripple reflection' as the background effect. Please help me create a lighting and set design plan. First image: a reference image for the final shot result; Second image: a top-down lighting diagram of the studio (indicating the positions of the key light, fill lights, and reflectors); Third image: a side-view structural diagram of the props—the water trough and glass—used to create the water ripple effect. Include text explanations for the aperture and shutter settings during shooting and techniques for creating the water ripple effect.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I am independently developing a puzzle game and need to design a level: 'Watchmaker's Workshop in Zero Gravity'. Please help me construct this scene. First, create a first-person perspective concept art of the scene, featuring floating gears, mainsprings, and tools; then create a planar topology map of the level's puzzle-solving path, marking the pickup sequence of 3 key items; in the text portion, describe in detail how players can utilize the 'zero gravity' physical property to unlock the final mechanism.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to independently publish a Zine (independent magazine) about 'Urban Weeds'. Please help me design layout sketches for two spreads. Spread A: the left page features a full-bleed close-up photograph of weeds, while the right page has poetry typesetting with generous white space; Spread B: employs a grid system to showcase botanical illustrations and short popular science texts of 4 different types of weeds. Please directly generate the visual layout designs for these two spreads, and explain your grid system parameters in the text (such as column layout, margin proportions).

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Planning a week-long hardcore trek along the Amazon rainforest perimeter, need a comprehensive illustrated survival guide for insect and poison protection. Don't show me scenery! I need: 1. A characteristic comparison chart of common poisonous plants (hand-drawn field guide style); 2. A knot-tying diagram for proper hammock mosquito net setup (close-up); 3. A safe retreat route diagram when encountering venomous snakes (overhead schematic). The accompanying text must be extremely concise, directly providing life-saving action steps.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm working on 3D modeling and need to create material textures for a 'bronze statue that has undergone a century of weathering'. Please help me generate several seamless texture assets and explain the connection nodes in the material shader. 1. A diffuse map of the bronze surface covered with patina/verdigris; 2. A corresponding normal map (using blue-purple tones to convey bump details); 3. A corresponding roughness map (in black, white, and gray). In the text portion, explain how to blend these three maps to make the specular highlights appear realistic.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: The company is hosting an annual strategy release conference themed 'Breaking Through,' with the venue located in an abandoned steel smelting plant. Help me design the stage visuals. First image: A front elevation rendering of the main stage, utilizing the existing blast furnace structure combined with modern LED screens and laser lights. Second image: An overhead view of the audience seating arrangement, breaking away from traditional theater-style seating and adopting a wraparound or irregular array layout. Third image: A close-up of dry ice and lighting special effects during guest entrances. The text portion should explain how this spatial design echoes the 'Breaking Through' theme.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm planning a 10-day self-drive ring road trip around Iceland next month. Please create a detailed itinerary guide for me, with a rendered image for each major attraction, annotating the best photography positions and optimal lighting times. Also, design a packing checklist infographic for me.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm an indie game developer. I need you to design 5 level themes with different biomes for my pixel art roguelike game. For each theme, provide me with a concept art piece and a color palette swatch. Also, help me write a level design document explaining the differences in gameplay mechanics.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me visualize this idea: I want to create a neo-Chinese style tea beverage brand named 'Shan Yin' (Mountain Seclusion), targeting urban white-collar professionals aged 25-35. Please create 3 logo designs in different directions, along with brand color palettes and typography recommendations, then produce 2 store space concept renderings, and finally provide a product cup packaging mockup.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: We just bought an 89-square-meter compact three-bedroom apartment, and the living room is only 18 square meters. I want a Nordic style while also ensuring adequate storage. Please provide 3 different living room layout plans, each with a 3D rendered image, annotate key furniture dimensions, and analyze the pros and cons of each plan along with the suitable household types.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to create a social media content series called '7 Days of Non-Repeating Fat-Loss Meals'. Help me plan recipes from Monday to Sunday, generating one overhead food plating shot per day with that Instagram aesthetic vibe. Then create an overall weekly calorie summary infographic with a consistent style.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm preparing for a fundraising roadshow. We are a startup focused on AI + pet health. Help me design 4 key pitch deck pages: cover page, market size page (with data visualization charts), product architecture page (illustrating our AI diagnostic workflow), and team page. Provide me with a high-quality slide mockup for each page.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to create a zine for my photography portfolio with the theme 'Industrial Ruins on the Urban Fringe.' Help me plan a 12-page layout design, select 4 representative spreads and create layout mockups for me. I want that Japanese-style photobook aesthetic with generous white space and distinctive typography. Design the front and back covers as well.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me create content for a children's science educational picture book series, themed 'If the Earth Shrunk to the Size of a Basketball'. Use analogies to explain the scale relationships in the solar system, and create 4 main illustrations (Earth vs. basketball, the size of the Sun, distances between planets, how long it takes to travel at the speed of light). The style should be cute but not childish, suitable for children aged 8-12.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I run a Taobao store selling handmade leather goods and recently launched a new vegetable-tanned leather tote bag. Please help me create a complete set of visuals for the e-commerce product detail page: a hero image with premium texture, 3 lifestyle scene images (commuting/weekend/travel scenarios), one comparison image showcasing material and craftsmanship details, and one size specification diagram. Please also write the accompanying copy.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm planning a spring marketing campaign for an outdoor camping brand with a brand tone leaning towards urban light outdoor. Help me brainstorm 3 different creative directions for the campaign, with one main key visual (KV) image and one slogan for each direction, then select the best direction and extend it into 3 social media posters.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to turn my cat's photo into a sticker pack with a total of 8 expressions. Let me describe my cat: an orange and white British Shorthair with a round face, very large eyes, and slightly chubby. Please draw it for me in a minimalist line illustration style like WeChat sticker packs, with each expression accompanied by a witty, meme-worthy caption.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to renovate my studio. The current walls are white, and the area is approximately 15 square meters. Please provide me with 3 different style wall renovation plans: one featuring a large-scale mural, one with a modular shelving unit combination, and one with a mixed-material collage wall. For each plan, give me a before/after comparison rendering and a budget estimate.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me create a visual identity design for my personal brand. I'm a tech and digital products review blogger with a style that's rational and geeky but not stiff. I need: a mascot character design (3 angles: front view/side view/three-quarter view), a YouTube channel banner, a video thumbnail template, and a business card design.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I have a client proposal next week for a cultural complex project, with the site located at an abandoned cement factory. Help me create a concept design visualization: first, an atmosphere image showing the existing site conditions, then a zoning diagram illustrating the renovation strategy, and finally generate 3 post-renovation renderings of different functional zones (art exhibition hall, maker workshop, rooftop garden). The design should convey a sense of dialogue between industrial heritage and new functions.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to plan a proposal for my girlfriend at her favorite botanical garden. Help me create a planning proposal: a design rendering of the entrance guidance area setup, a design rendering of the main proposal venue (inside the greenhouse conservatory) setup, a timeline process infographic, and also design a hand-drawn style invitation card (a 'girlfriends' afternoon tea' invitation to trick her into coming).

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm creating a research video on 'The Evolution of Dragon Imagery Across Different Cultures.' Help me organize the content and generate accompanying illustrations: Chinese dragon (Shang and Zhou dynasty bronze vessel style), European dragon (medieval illuminated manuscript style), Mesoamerican Feathered Serpent (Aztec stone carving style), and Japanese dragon (Ukiyo-e style). Create one image for each type depicting the dragon in its corresponding cultural art style. Additionally, create a comparative infographic showing the characteristic features of all four dragons.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me design a complete wayfinding system for a gym, including: exterior façade signage rendering, reception desk backdrop wall rendering, wayfinding signage design for functional zones (cardio zone/strength training zone/stretching zone/locker room), and an overall floor plan layout indicating all signage positions. The brand name is 'FORGE', with a hardcore industrial style aesthetic.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My parents (60+, with limited mobility) and I want to travel to Japan's Kansai region for 7 days, preferring a slow-paced trip: daily walking should not exceed 12,000 steps, with the ability to return to the hotel for a midday rest; minimize hotel changes (at most 1 change). Please provide me with an 'actionable' illustrated travel guide directly, not just a long block of text. The output must alternate between text and images, with at least 3 images

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My 45㎡ small apartment needs a storage renovation: the entryway is 1.6m wide (with a 60cm deep wall recess on the left side upon entering), the living room sofa wall is 2.8m long, and the opposite TV wall is 2.6m long; I have a cat, so the litter box needs to be concealed but easy to clean; no drilling holes in the walls is allowed; the main passage must maintain at least 90cm clearance. Please provide me with an 'actionable plan' with alternating text and images, including at least 4 images: ①Image 1: Draw a simplified current floor plan (with key dimensions, doors/windows, and passage widths); ②Text 1: Explain the pain points and renovation goals; ③Image 2: Draw the renovated floor plan (annotating new cabinet dimensions, litter box location, robot vacuum charging station, and categorized storage zones); ④Text 2: Provide the zonal storage logic (entryway temporary items/frequently used bags/packages/cleaning supplies/cat supplies); ⑤Image 3: Create an interior layered diagram of the entryway cabinet (like a cross-section view, labeling what goes on each level); ⑥Text 3: Provide a shopping list (use generic product categories + dimensions as much as possible, do not specify brands), budget range, and a step-by-step schedule executable within one week; ⑦Image 4: Create a diagram for the TV wall 'cable concealment + outlet management' (must consider that cats may paw at cables). Additional note: The overall style should be clean and timeless, avoid over-decoration.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I need to create social media content for a "sugar-free sparkling water" product. Please directly produce ready-to-use materials with alternating images and text, at least 3 images. Product specifications: 330ml aluminum can, lime mint flavor. Please generate 3 posters with different layouts (1080x1350 vertical format), but they must follow the same brand guidelines (consistent color scheme and typography style). Each image must be accompanied by corresponding copy (headline + one supporting line + CTA button text + 3 hashtags). Retouching/compositing requirements (must be reflected in the final images): can surface reflections should be clean without overexposure; add a small amount of condensation droplets but avoid a plastic look; background should have a subtle gradient with a slight "fresh, airy feel"; the can must have a realistic drop shadow beneath it; overall color tone must be unified. Layout hard constraints: the bottom-right corner must reserve a 320x320 clear blank area for a QR code; the main headline must stay within the safe zone (not touching the edges); the image must not contain night market/concert/wedding/coffee shop/cyberpunk elements.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: My boss asked me to create an e-commerce product detail page for a new silk pajama set. Help me come up with a layout that alternates between images and text. First, give me a full-body shot of a model wearing this dark green pajama set in a French vintage-style bedroom, with lighting that creates striped shadow patterns from morning sunlight streaming through venetian blinds. Then, add a macro close-up shot of the fabric that must showcase the luster and drape of the silk. Finally, give me a flat-lay image of the same pajama set on a pure white background. Intersperse some premium-feeling marketing copy between these three images, and the layout should have a sense of breathing room.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm going on a self-driving road trip around Iceland next month. Help me create a nine-grid visual guide for posting on social media. You don't need to draw all of them, but you need to generate 3 core images with captions. The first one is a minimalist-style route map, marking several stops from Reykjavik to Vik; the second one is a cold-toned landscape photo of the black sand beach, with that end-of-the-world sense of solitude and some film grain; the third one is an OOTD collage for warm layering outfits (hardshell jacket + hiking boots). Each image should have a caption suitable for posting on Xiaohongshu, with emojis.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me design an original female assassin character for a Chinese-style fantasy game, with both illustrations and detailed text descriptions. The first image should be a full-body character illustration of her wearing dark purple fitted combat attire, holding two semi-transparent jade short blades, with a cold gaze in her eyes. The second image should be a close-up detail shot of the hidden patterns on the back of her clothing, which should resemble the taotie motifs found on ancient Chinese bronze vessels. The third image should be a dynamic combat sketch showcasing her leaping attack pose. Each image should be accompanied by detailed lore descriptions and skill introductions.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm conceptualizing a short film with a space exploration theme. Help me create 3 key storyboard frames with director's notes. The first is a wide shot—a massive ring-shaped space station floating near Saturn's rings, conveying a strong sci-fi epic feel. The second cuts to a medium shot—an astronaut inside the cabin gazing out through the porthole, with a faint blue glow from screen reflections on their face. The third is a close-up—the astronaut's gloved hand pressing a red emergency button. All three images must maintain a consistent visual style, like a Hollywood blockbuster.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I need to design a new dessert called 'Autumn Falling Leaves' for a three-Michelin-star French restaurant. Please help me generate a plating design proposal with images and text. The first image should be a top-down view of the final plating, on a black matte slate plate, featuring caramel maple leaves and chestnut mousse, with a sprinkle of gold leaf flakes on the side, lit with top lighting. The second image should be a side cross-section view of this dessert, showing the layered structure of mousse, jelly, and biscuit base inside. The text portion should describe the ingredients and textural layers of each layer.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to post a fashion note about 'how to wear wasteland style with a high-end feel.' Please help me generate two images and copy. The first image shows a model dressed in wasteland style (distressed holes, patchwork, earth tone color palette) standing in a desert, with the background having that stretched perspective effect from a wide-angle lens. For the second image, assume I used an AI outpainting tool to extend the first image to the left—please generate the expanded scene: the right half must be exactly identical to the first image, with a rusty vintage off-road vehicle added on the left side. The copy should teach everyone how to style this look.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me plan a modern minimalist boutique guesthouse project built on the edge of a cliff. I need an interleaved image-text proposal: The first image is an aerial view of the building exterior, a pure white geometric structure cantilevered over a seaside cliff, with waves crashing against the rocks. The second image is an indoor infinity pool, with a seamless view where the sea and sky merge into one, featuring the orange-pink glow of sunset casting reflections on the water surface. The third image is a floor plan sketch of the guesthouse. Each image should be accompanied by the architect's design philosophy.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I want to DIY a vintage brass steampunk-style table lamp myself (note: Victorian-era steampunk). Help me generate a DIY illustrated guide. The first image should be a flat lay of the required parts (Knolling photography style), including gears, brass tubes, an Edison bulb, and a walnut wood base, all arranged neatly. The second image should show the assembled table lamp when lit, emitting a warm yellow glow. For the text portion, write out the assembly process step by step.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Help me design an English countryside-style private garden. I need a solution combining images and text: The first image should be an overall landscape view of the garden, featuring a gravel-paved pathway lined with hydrangeas and roses of various colors on both sides, leading to a white wooden gazebo at the end. The second image should be a color palette chart for plant color coordination, extracting the dominant colors from the first image and generating 5 solid color swatches displayed side by side. The third image should be a close-up detail shot, showing a pair of gardening shears and a straw hat placed on a vintage wrought-iron bench. Include plant care recommendations.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Our team is designing a futuristic single-person commuter concept car. Help me create two images along with design descriptions. The first image should be an exterior rendering of the vehicle, featuring a teardrop-shaped body, silver liquid metal material, with a magnetic levitation hubless design, set against a minimalist white studio background. The second image should be an interior view, with no traditional steering wheel, only a holographic projection interactive interface and an ergonomic zero-gravity seat. Provide a written description explaining the aerodynamics and interaction logic.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I need to design a series of modern silk scarves inspired by 'Dunhuang Murals'. Please help me generate an illustrated proposal. The first image should be a flat pattern design of the silk scarf unfolded, incorporating elements of the Nine-Colored Deer and Flying Apsaras. The colors should use classic azurite blue, malachite green, and ochre yellow, with a symmetrical composition. The second image should be a street-style photo of an elegant model wearing this silk scarf tied around her neck, with a white shirt as a backdrop. For the text portion, write about the cultural symbolism behind the pattern and styling suggestions.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm a photography beginner and want to shoot a set of low-key dark-style portraits at home. Please help me generate a lighting guide. The first image should be the final photography result—a half-profile close-up of a male model with only half of his face illuminated while the other half completely fades into darkness (Rembrandt lighting), with eyes that convey a sense of story. The second image should be a bird's-eye view lighting diagram, using simple graphic icons to indicate the specific relative positions of the camera, model, key light (with softbox), and reflector. Include text explaining the recommended camera settings.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: We are launching a premium craft beer with a focus on fruit flavors. Help me generate a packaging design proposal with visuals and copy. First, give me a main visual image: a beer bottle with a vintage woodcut-style label placed on ice, the bottle is brown glass, with a dark-toned bar counter as the background. Next, assuming I want to create series extensions, please help me generate two variant images: one with the label's main color changed to bright orange (representing orange flavor), and another changed to purple-red (representing raspberry flavor). Important! Except for the label color and the small fruit icons on it changing, the bottle's posture, ice refraction, and background must be exactly identical to the first image. Include product copy.
